name_cn:

French factory leather, contains electronic chip, embossed baguette white, V-purchased development〰️
Textured soft grained calfskin
Soft grained calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Hook closure
Zippered interior pocket
Strap: Removable, non-adjustable
Bag length: 43.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, removable
Hardware: Pure steel 24k gold plating
Leather: French factory embossed grained calfskin
Dimensions: 23 × 16 × 8.5 cm
